{% if section.extra.hero_title %} {{ section.extra.hero_title | markdown(inline=true) | safe }} {% else %} Your AI Assistant,
Right in Your Browser {% endif %}

{% if section.extra.hero_subtitle %} {{ section.extra.hero_subtitle }} {% else %} BraceKit is an AI-powered Chrome sidebar that reads page content and lets you chat with multiple LLM providers. Features MCP support, streaming responses, and a premium dark UI. {% endif %}

{% if section.extra.hero_actions %} {% for action in section.extra.hero_actions %} {% if action.icon %} {% endif %} {{ action.label }} {% endfor %} {% else %} Install Extension Read Docs {% endif %}
{% if section.extra.hero_image %}
{% endif %}

{{ section.extra.features_title | default(value="Everything You Need") }}

{{ section.extra.features_subtitle | default(value="Powerful features designed for productivity and seamless AI integration.") }}

{% if section.extra.features %} {% for feature in section.extra.features %}
{{ feature.icon | safe }}

{{ feature.title }}

{{ feature.description }}

{% endfor %} {% else %}

Streaming AI Chat

Real-time streaming responses with markdown rendering. Support for reasoning models that show their thought process.

Page Context

Read entire page content or grab highlighted text. The AI has full context of what you're viewing.

MCP Support

Connect MCP servers for extended tool usage. Enable external tools and capabilities seamlessly.

Multi-Provider

OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, xAI, DeepSeek, and custom endpoints. Switch providers instantly.

Dark Theme

Premium dark UI with glassmorphism effects. Easy on the eyes, beautiful to look at.

PIN Protection

Secure your API keys and sensitive data with PIN protection. Your data stays private.

{% endif %}

Supported Providers
